Welcome to Dragon Repeller. You must defeat the dragon that is preventing people from leaving the town. You are in the town square. Where do you want to go? Use the buttons above.

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Vaš selektor za #monsterStats mora imati border od/za 1px solid #0a0a23.
tests.testString:
const border = new __helpers.CSSHelp(document).getStyle('#monsterStats')?.getPropertyValue('border');
assert.equal(border, '1px solid rgb(10, 10, 35)');

tests.text: Vaš selektor za #monsterStats mora da ima 5px unutrašnjeg prostora.
Tvoj selektor za #monsterStats treba da ima color od #ffffff.

description: Primeni na vaš elementu za #monsterStats border i padding, isto kao i kod vašeg elementa za #stats. Podesi mu boju na #ffffff i dodaj pozadinsku temu od #c70d0d.
